law: Ontario Safe Streets Act, SO 1999, c 8
purposes: To address public-safety concerns associated with squeegee work and highway panhandling

provisions.text: No person shall solicit in an aggressive manner. (from training data)
No person shall solicit a person who is using, waiting to use, or departing from an automated teller machine... or who is waiting at a... public transit stop. (from training data)
No person shall, while on a roadway, solicit a person who is in or on a stopped, standing or parked vehicle. (from training data)

derivation:
MTM-Literal derivation
  m = |purposes| = 2
  n = |provisions| = 3
  purposes served by ≥1 provision = 2/2
  → F (Faithfulness) = 2/2 = 1.0000
  provisions serving no purpose = 0/3
  → X (Excess)       = 0/3 = 0.0000
  α = 0.5, β = 0.5
  MTM-L = 100 · [α · (1 − F) + β · X]
        = 100 · [0.5 · (1 − 1.0000) + 0.5 · 0.0000]
        = 100 · [0.0000 + 0.0000]
        = 0.00
